default.text: ⟦⟦ P̃ãt̃t̃ẽr̃ñ f̃l̃õw̃ s̃h̃ĩf̃t̃s̃ d̃ĩr̃ẽc̃t̃ĩõñ õṽẽr̃ t̃ĩm̃ẽ. ⟧⟧

rotational_patterns.text: ⟦⟦ P̃ãt̃t̃ẽr̃ñs̃ f̃õl̃l̃õw̃ c̃ũr̃ṽẽd̃ õr̃ r̃õt̃ãt̃ĩñg̃ t̃r̃ãj̃ẽc̃t̃õr̃ĩẽs̃. ⟧⟧

directional_shift.text: ⟦⟦ F̃l̃õw̃ d̃ĩr̃ẽc̃t̃ĩõñ c̃h̃ãñg̃ẽs̃ c̃ãñ ãf̃f̃ẽc̃t̃ p̃ãt̃t̃ẽr̃ñ r̃ẽãd̃ĩñg̃. ⟧⟧
